code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut best_start = 0
mut best_len = 0
mut cur_start = 0
mut cur_len = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if cur_len > best_len
      best_len = cur_len
      best_start = cur_start
    end
    cur_len = 0
    cur_start = i + 1
  else
    cur_len = cur_len + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if cur_len > best_len
  best_len = cur_len
  best_start = cur_start
end

let word = string.substring(line, best_start, best_start + best_len)
println("longest=#{word}")
